Raid Battles.title: Shadow Heatran in Shadow Raids
Raid Battles.description:
Shadow Heatran will appear in Pokémon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Heatran!
Shadow Heatran will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from December 2 to January 1:
- December 6 - December 7
- December 13 - December 14
- December 20 - December 21
- December 27 - December 28

Raid Battles.title: Blacephalon in Raids
Raid Battles.description: Blacephalon return to raids on December 31, 2025, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Swampert in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Swampert return to Mega Raids on December 31, 2025, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Genesect (Burn Drive), Genesect (Chill Drive) in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Genesect (Burn Drive) and Genesect (Chill Drive) will be in five-star raid battles from January 5, 2026 to January 16, 2026.
There will also be Raid Hours featuring Genesect (Burn Drive) and Genesect (Chill Drive) from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following dates:
- January 7
- January 14

Raid Battles.title: Mega Blaziken in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Blaziken return to Mega Raids on January 5, 2026, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Sceptile in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Sceptile return to Mega Raids on January 16, 2026, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Thundurus (Incarnate Forme) in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Thundurus (Incarnate Forme) will be in five-star raid battles from January 16, 2026 to January 25, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Thundurus (Incarnate Forme) from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- January 21

Raid Battles.title: Mega Ampharos in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Ampharos return to Mega Raids on January 25, 2026, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Tornadus (Incarnate Forme) in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Tornadus (Incarnate) will be in five-star raid battles from January 25, 2026 to February 4, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Tornadus (Incarnate Forme) from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- January 28

Raid Battles.title: Dialga and Palkia in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Dialga and Palkia will be in five-star raid battles from February 4, 2026 to February 16, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Dialga and Palkia from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following dates:
- February 4
- February 11

Raid Battles.title: Mega Pidgeot in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Pidgeot return to Mega Raids on February 4, 2026, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Sableye in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Sableye return to Mega Raids on February 16, 2026, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Solgaleo in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Solgaleo will be in five-star raid battles from February 16, 2026 to February 21, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Solgaleo from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- February 18

Raid Battles.title: Lunala in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description: Lunala will be in five-star raid battles from February 21, 2026 to February 22, 2026.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Absol in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Absol return to Mega Raids on February 21, 2026, at 10 am local time.

1/4 Hatch Distance
3-hour Incense*
Increased Spawns

Community Day.description: Piplup, the Penguin Pokémon, will be featured during January Community Day Classic!

Community Day.title: Grookey Community Day

bonuses: 1-hour Lures*
2x Catch Candy
2x Chance to receive Candy XL from catching Pokémon
3-hour Incense
3x Catch Stardust
Increased Spawns
One additional Special Trade can be made for a maximum of three for the day*
Trades made will require 50% less Stardust*

Community Day.description: Grookey, the Chimp Pokémon, will be featured during January Community Day!

bonuses: 1-hour Lures
2x Catch Candy

Community Day.description: Vulpix and Alolan Vulpix, the Fox Pokémon, will be featured during February Community Day!

Event.title: New Year's 2026

bonuses: 2× Stardust from Raid Battles
2× XP from Raid Battles
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Party Top Hat Pikachu
One additional Raid Pass per day from spinning Photo Discs at Gyms (for a daily total of two)

Event.description: Ring in 2026 with Pokémon GO’s New Year’s event!

Event.title: Pinch Perfect

bonuses: 2× XP for catching Pokémon
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Corphish, Shiny Dwebble, and Shiny Clauncher

Event.description: Beware and prepare for Klawf and more during the Pinch Perfect event!

Event.title: High Zaptitude

bonuses: 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance when Eggs are placed in an Incubator during the event period
2× Stardust for catching Pokémon
2× Stardust for hatching Pokémon
2× XP for catching Pokémon
2× XP for hatching Pokémon
Increased chance to hatch Shiny Tadbulb

Event.description: Charge up for the High Zaptitude event to unlock Wattrel’s debut!

Event.title: Precious Pals

bonuses: Additional Candy XL when walking with your Buddy Pokémon
Earn additional hearts with your Buddy Pokémon
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Goldeen
Increased chance to hatch Shiny Goldeen and Shiny Fidough

Event.description: Make memories with your Buddy Pokémon during the Precious Pals event!

Event.title: Into the Depths

bonuses: 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance
3× XP from completing Routes

Event.description: Plunge Into the Depths for Glimmet’s debut in Pokémon GO!

Event.title: Oricorio Catch Mastery

bonuses: 2× XP for successfully catching Pokémon with Nice Throws or better
Increased Candy for successfully catching Pokémon with Nice Throws or better

Event.description: Master your throwing skills and catch Oricorio, the Dancing Pokémon, during this Catch Mastery event!

Event.title: Carnival of Flamigo

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
2× Incense duration
500 Additional Stardust for catching Flamigo
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Lotad, Shiny Spritzee, and Shiny Pikipek

Event.description:
Celebrate the spirit of Carnival with Flamigo’s Pokémon GO debut!
The Carnival of Flamigo event will take place from February 3, 2026 at 10 am to February 8, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Valentine's Day 2026

bonuses: 2× Stardust from opening Gifts
2× XP for catching Pokémon
Free Timed Research awarding encounters with Spinda with a heart pattern
Gifts may include Rare Candy
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Nidoran♀ and Shiny Nidoran♂
Increased chance to hatch Shiny Nidoran♀, Shiny Nidoran♂, and Shiny Cherubi
Successfully catching a Pokémon with a Curveball Throw will award 750 XP

Event.description: The Valentine’s Day 2026 event will take place from February 10, 2026 at 10 am to February 15, 2026 at 8 pm local time.

Event.title: Lunar New Year 2026

bonuses: Increased chance to become Lucky Friends
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Blitzle, Shiny Darumaka, and Shiny Gimmighoul
Increased chance to get Lucky Pokémon in trades
PokéStops may turn gold without a Golden Lure Module

Event.description:
Celebrate the Lunar New Year with Pokémon GO’s 2026 event!
The Lunar New Year 2026 event will take place from February 17, 2026 at 10 am to February 21, 2026 at 8 pm local time.

PokéStop Showcase.title: Pikachu PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description:
There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Pikachu. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!
- Pikachu

PokéStop Showcase.title: Water-type and Grass-type PokéStop Showcases
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Water-type Pokémon and Grass-type Pokémon. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.description:
There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Klawf and Dhelmise. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!
- Dhelmise
- Klawf

PokéStop Showcase.title: Rock-type Pokémon PokéStop Showcases
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Rock-type Pokémon. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.description:

- Kilowattrel

PokéStop Showcase.title: Fidough and Dachsbun PokéStop Showcases
PokéStop Showcase.description:
There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Fidough and Dachsbun. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!
- Fidough
- Dachsbun

PokéStop Showcase.title: Ultra Buddy and Best Buddy PokéStop Showcases
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Ultra Buddy or higher. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.title: Normal-type PokéStop Showcases
PokéStop Showcase.description:
There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Normal-type. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!
Trainers will be able to enter any Normal-type Pokémon in to these Showcases. However, unlike previous type specific showcases, the score will be relative to their own species rather than each other. This means that any XXL-sized Normal-type Pokémon will be competitive.

PokéStop Showcase.title: Ho-Oh PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description:
There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Ho-Oh. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!
- Ho-Oh

PokéStop Showcase.title: Toucannon, Ludicolo, and Quaquaval PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Toucannon, Ludicolo, and Quaquaval. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.title: Flamigo PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Flamigo. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.title: Flying-type Pokémon PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Flying-type Pokémon. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.title: Enamorus (Therian Forme) PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Enamorus (Therian Forme). Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.title: Galarian Ponyta and Turtonator PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Galarian Ponyta and Turtonator. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.title: Meowth, Vulpix, and Alolan Vulpix PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description:
There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Meowth, Vulpix, and Alolan Vulpix. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!
Alolan Vulpix and Vulpix are featured in separate Showcases. Any regional variant of Meowth (Kantonian, Alolan, or Galarian) can be entered in the Meowth Showcase.

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Drampa during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Tales of Transformation. They will also take over Power Spots for an hour each week on Mondays from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time!
On January 5, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon is Drampa.
- Drampa

Max Mondays.description:

Max Mondays.title: Kanto Starters Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Precious Paths. They will also take over Power Spots for an hour each week on Mondays from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time!
On February 23, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon are Bulbasaur, Squirtle, and Charmander.
Note: Chansey will be available from February 23 to March 2, but Kanto Starters Max Monday on February 23 will feature Bulbasaur, Squirtle, and Charmander.

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration

GO Pass.description:
Palkia and the Timed Incubator return for GO Pass: December!
From Tuesday, December 2, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, January 6, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for December will be available in Pokémon GO!

From Tuesday, January 6, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, February 3, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for January will be available in Pokémon GO!

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from December 30, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. to January 6, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Sunshine Cup: Great League Edition | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Sunshine Cup: Great League Edition will run from January 6, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to January 13, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Normal-, Fire-, Grass-, and Ground-type Pokémon are eligible.
- Charizard is not allowed.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Charizard

GO Battle League.title: Master Premier and Retro Cup: Great League Edition | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Master Premier and Retro Cup: Great League Edition will run from January 13, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to January 20, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- No CP limit.
- Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Dark-, Steel-, and Fairy-type Pokémon are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Ultra Premier | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Ultra Premier will run from January 20, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to January 27, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from January 27, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to February 3, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and 2026 Championship Series Cup | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and 2026 Championship Series Cup will run from February 3, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to February 10, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Bug-, Dark-, Normal-, and Dragon-type Pokémon are eligible.
- Fighting-, Flying-, and Steel-type Pokémon are not eligible.
- Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, Mega Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.
- The following Pokémon will be allowed: Seaking, Politoed, Milotic, and Froslass.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Wigglytuff
- Chansey
- Crustle
- Diggersby
- Ribombee
- Araquanid
- Turtonator
- Morgrem
- Morpeko

GO Battle League.title: Master League and 2026 Championship Series Cup | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and 2026 Championship Series Cup will run from February 10, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to February 17, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Bug-, Dark-, Normal-, and Dragon-type Pokémon are eligible.
- Fighting-, Flying-, and Steel-type Pokémon are not eligible.
- Legendary Pokémon, Mythical Pokémon, Mega Pokémon, and Ultra Beasts are not eligible.
- The following Pokémon will be allowed: Seaking, Politoed, Milotic, and Froslass.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Wigglytuff
- Chansey
- Crustle
- Diggersby
- Ribombee
- Araquanid
- Turtonator
- Morgrem
- Morpeko

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Barboach Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Tuesday during the month of January.
January 6: The featured Pokémon is Barboach and the special bonus is 2× Catch XP.

Raid Day.title: Kyurem Fusion Raid Day

bonuses: 2× Stardust from Raid Battles
50% more XP from Raid Battles
Eight additional Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a daily total of 14)
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Reshiram, Shiny Zekrom, and Shiny Kyurem in raids
Increased chance to get Rare Candy XL from Raid Battles
Receive up to five additional free Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a total of six)

Reshiram, Zekrom, Black Kyurem* and White Kyurem* will appear more frequently in raids, and these Raid Bosses will alternate each half hour during event hours. Reshiram and Black Kyurem will appear in raids first, followed by Zekrom and White Kyurem
The Remote Raid Pass limit will increase to 20 from Friday, January 9, at 5:00 p.m. to Saturday, January 10, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. PST

Raid Day.description: Battle with the twin heroes for truth or ideals during Kyurem Fusion Raid Day!

Raid Day.title: Shadow Raikou Raid Day

bonuses: 2× Stardust from Raid Battles

Increased chance to get Rare Candy XL from Raid Battles
The Remote Raid limit will increase to 20 from Friday, January 23, at 4:00 p.m. to Saturday, January 24, 2026, at 7:00 p.m. PST
Up to five additional free Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a total of six)

Raid Day.description: Unite with fellow Trainers to rescue Shadow Raikou from Team GO Rocket during a Shadow Raid Day event!

Receive up to eight additional Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a daily total of 14)**
Receive up to five additional free Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a total of six)*
The Remote Raid limit will increase to 20 from Friday, February 13, at 4:00 p.m. to Saturday, February 14, 2026, at 7:00 p.m. PST

Raid Day.description: Therian Forme Enamorus descends from the clouds for its Pokémon GO debut! The Therian Forme Enamorus Raid Day will take place on February 14, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm local time.

Team GO Rocket.title: Precious Pals: Taken Over

bonuses: Pokémon caught via one-star and three-star Shadow Raids during the event will have a wider variance of Attack, Defense, and HP.
Team GO Rocket will appear more frequently at PokéStops and in balloons*
You can use a Charged TM to help a Shadow Pokémon forget the Charged Attack Frustration.

Team GO Rocket.description: Rescue Shadow Incarnate Forme Thundurus during Precious Pals: Taken Over!

bonuses: 1/4 Adventuring distance to receive Max Particles*
2× Max Particles from exploring*
2× XP from Max Battles
8× Max Particles from Power Spots
All Power Spots will host Gigantamax Battles
From February 14 at 4:00 p.m. to February 15 at 8:00 p.m. PST (GMT −8), the daily Remote Raid limit will increase from 10 to 20
Max Particle collection limit increased to 1,600
Power Spots will refresh more frequently
Up to four Special Trades for the day

Max Battles.description: The Gigantamax Meowth Max Battle Day event will take place on February 15, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm local time.

Research.title: Twitch Drops for 2026 Pokémon Europe International Championships
Research.description:
Get codes for exclusive Timed Research during the 2026 Pokémon Europe International Championships Twitch broadcast.
Pokémon GO Trainers are headed to London for the 2026 Pokémon Europe International Championships to have their skills tested as they battle on the road to crown the 2026 Pokémon World Champion!
You’ll be able to watch exciting Pokémon battles live from London all weekend long, from February 13–15, 2026. Pokémon GO Trainers who tune in to the EUIC livestream on Twitch can also receive Timed Research via Twitch Drops, featuring 15 Seel Candy XL, 20 Fast TMs, 20 Charged TMs, and a Dewgong inspired by NiteTimeClasher’s LAIC-winning team.
You can watch live and learn more about the 2026 Europe International Championships at:
twitch.tv/pokemongo
Find more information on the Timed Research from the Twitch Drops in the Research section.

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Tainan Metropolitan Park, Tainan, Taiwan
Dates: February 20–22, 2026
Time: 9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. GMT+8
Ticket Price: NT $733 (Early Bird, regular $818) – Early Bird Discount available through December 31
Experience an exclusive in-person Pokémon GO event in Tainan! Inspired by a place where dreams and adventures begin, Pokémon GO Tour is bringing the Kalos region to life in Tainan. Embark on a journey of beauty and bonds as you collect Pokémon, discover legendary stories, and experience the community of Pokémon GO in-person.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Tainan Metropolitan Park during the date and time noted on your event ticket.

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Tainan Metropolitan Park, Tainan, Taiwan
Dates: February 20, 21, 22, 2026
Time: 5:00 p.m. – 7:00 p.m. GMT+8
Ticket Price: NT$529.00
An all-new nighttime celebration is coming to Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos!
Attendees may purchase this ticket as an addition to their primary Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos – Tainan ticket. Add-on tickets are NT$529.00 (or the equivalent pricing tier in your local currency, plus any applicable taxes and fees) and are available for purchase on the Pokémon GO Tour website. Event gameplay will be available only at the date, time, and location specified on your ticket.
Note: Tickets to this event are nonrefundable (subject to applicable law and the exceptions set forth in the Terms of Service). Tickets are first come, first served and are available for purchase while supplies last.
- Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos - Tainan 2026
It’s a night of fun, friends, and Pokémon adventures!
For the first time ever, we’re excited to offer a new nighttime event experience at Pokémon GO Tour, available to purchase as an add-on to your main event ticket. Mega Night is a ticketed evening event, taking place after the main daytime Pokémon GO Tour event.
Look forward to unique gameplay, special entertainment and more during this “after hours” extravaganza!
All event gameplay is exclusive to Mega Night ticket holders.
Please note: You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Tainan Metropolitan Park during the date and time noted on your add-on ticket.
